rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in the component type scope when they refer to component ports.
Use `assign` only in implementation scopes for existing outputs or auxiliary variables.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts are defined within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use case-provided bounds and visible feature names in contracts.
Ensure AGREE expression types match AADL data types (bool, int, real).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Define range checks using `eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;`
Use exact Boolean expressions only for AGREE bool ports.
anti_patterns: Do not include AADL property names (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions.
Avoid range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean or opaque data ports without a numeric scalar representation.
